acceptance_targets: [award_001] Pass if the revised stretch beginning at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_18.md:191 includes at least one new aftermath pressure from above that changes Owen's or Tallow's behavior before the closing image, and if the final two paragraphs center Owen's exclusion/cost rather than adding fresh procedure. Fail if the chapter still pivots from public aftermath into uninterrupted setup.

[craft_001] Pass if the revised absorption sequence shows at least one failed alternative or resisted action before the final state, and if the text explicitly ties the surviving service hand to a rule or sacrifice established within the scene. Fail if the stone still passively resolves storage, secrecy, and future procedure in one uninterrupted handoff.

[prose_001] Pass if the revised span from snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_18.md:261 through snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_18.md:333 contains no more than two sentences whose primary turn is explicit negation/correction, and at least three of the cited beats are rewritten as affirmative statements. Fail if three or more of the cited beats still rely on the same contrast formula.

[full_award_005] Pass if, from the revised aftermath at snapshots/cycle_02/FINAL_NOVEL.md:5244, snapshots/cycle_02/FINAL_NOVEL.md:5284, snapshots/cycle_02/FINAL_NOVEL.md:5344, and snapshots/cycle_02/FINAL_NOVEL.md:5404, a reader can answer three questions without inference from earlier chapters alone: what Owen refused, what that refusal cost in the battle, and what concrete social reality he now faces because of it. Fail if the ending still relies mainly on general disgust, isolation, or housekeeping to imply those answers.

findings.acceptance_test: Pass if the revised stretch beginning at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_18.md:191 includes at least one new aftermath pressure from above that changes Owen's or Tallow's behavior before the closing image, and if the final two paragraphs center Owen's exclusion/cost rather than adding fresh procedure. Fail if the chapter still pivots from public aftermath into uninterrupted setup.
findings.problem: The chapter's strongest aftermath material is in the Hall, but the closing movement gives a large share of its space to maintenance handoff and node logistics. That keeps the ending legible, yet it makes the last act read more like custodial setup than the fullest dramatic expression of Owen's social and moral exile.
findings.rewrite_direction: Rework the second scene beginning at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_18.md:191, with special attention to snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_18.md:297 and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_18.md:315, so the undercroft action stays under active pressure from the dawn-above aftermath. Compress or interrupt the instruction-heavy handoff and let the closing labor beat at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_18.md:337 land as consequence rather than administrative setup.

findings.acceptance_test: Pass if the revised absorption sequence shows at least one failed alternative or resisted action before the final state, and if the text explicitly ties the surviving service hand to a rule or sacrifice established within the scene. Fail if the stone still passively resolves storage, secrecy, and future procedure in one uninterrupted handoff.
findings.problem: The manuscript-absorption beat solves several housekeeping problems in one motion: the Leaves stop being portable, exactly the maintenance hand stays accessible, and Owen is pushed into permanent custody. The scene has texture, but the outcome is so neat that it reads as local convenience rather than fully resisted causality.
findings.rewrite_direction: Rework the transfer sequence beginning at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_18.md:267 and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_18.md:275, then the surviving-page beat at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_18.md:289, so Owen or Tallow must test, misread, or choose among bad options before the final state locks in. Make the visible service hand and the Phipps mark at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_18.md:307 emerge from an explicit rule or sacrifice on the page, not from the node handing back the cleanest possible answer.

findings.acceptance_test: Pass if the revised span from snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_18.md:261 through snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_18.md:333 contains no more than two sentences whose primary turn is explicit negation/correction, and at least three of the cited beats are rewritten as affirmative statements. Fail if three or more of the cited beats still rely on the same contrast formula.
findings.problem: The final third leans repeatedly on negation-and-correction sentence turns: 'not changing exactly, but', 'There was no question', 'It was not', 'not pain exactly, but', 'did not soften, but'. The pattern is effective once or twice, but at this density it becomes a noticeable prose tic and flattens the undercroft pages.
findings.rewrite_direction: In the undercroft stretch beginning at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_18.md:261 and recurring at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_18.md:279, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_18.md:289, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_18.md:309, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_18.md:315, and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_18.md:333, replace several negation-driven turns with direct affirmative sensory or causal sentences. Let at least three of those beats land on what the stone does, what Owen feels, or what Tallow sees without first backing away from an incorrect phrasing.

findings.acceptance_test: Pass if, from the revised aftermath at snapshots/cycle_02/FINAL_NOVEL.md:5244, snapshots/cycle_02/FINAL_NOVEL.md:5284, snapshots/cycle_02/FINAL_NOVEL.md:5344, and snapshots/cycle_02/FINAL_NOVEL.md:5404, a reader can answer three questions without inference from earlier chapters alone: what Owen refused, what that refusal cost in the battle, and what concrete social reality he now faces because of it. Fail if the ending still relies mainly on general disgust, isolation, or housekeeping to imply those answers.
findings.problem: The aftermath does not cash out Owen's chapter 17 refusal specifically enough to close the novel at shortlist force. Martha and Prue register disgust and distance, but the Hall never makes legible what his unused clause cost this battle or how that knowledge now sits in the survivor community. The ending gives him maintenance work and isolation, yet diffuses the central cruelty into mood and implication.
findings.rewrite_direction: Rework the Hall and kitchen aftermath anchored at snapshots/cycle_02/FINAL_NOVEL.md:5244, snapshots/cycle_02/FINAL_NOVEL.md:5284, snapshots/cycle_02/FINAL_NOVEL.md:5344, and snapshots/cycle_02/FINAL_NOVEL.md:5404 so one or two consequences of the unused hostile-wandwork clause become explicit and attributable. Keep the scene local: a named report from Neville, Martha, or another survivor about curses still flying where they should not have; a death or maiming whose shape the clause would plausibly have changed; or Prue naming exactly what she witnessed below in enough detail to prevent the ending from hiding inside ellipsis. Do not soften Owen's choice or excuse it; make the cost readable.

non_negotiables: Maintain heading contract exactly (# Chapter N).
Elliptical clipping is not permitted in dialogue or narration.
Avoid transcript cadence in high-stakes dialogue.
Avoid stiff over-formality in dialogue; use contractions and colloquial rhythm where character-true.
Preserve productive dialogue roughness; do not clean living speech into balanced thesis statements.
Reduce procedural drift when it displaces embodied consequence.
Maintain character-specific voice signatures from style bible.
Honor aesthetic risk policy: sanitization is the primary craft risk — do not soften, euphemize, or retreat from the story's established register. When in doubt, err toward rawness.

aesthetic_risk_policy.creative_risk_policy: Lean into the premise's sharpest contradiction: school-year comedy, adolescent awkwardness, punitive cruelty, and cosmic dread may coexist in the same novel without canceling each other. When a scene offers a cleaner version and a truer version, choose the truer one unless the character is actively refusing perception on the page.
aesthetic_risk_policy.euphemism_penalty: If pain, cruelty, fear, or moral ugliness would leave a bodily or environmental trace, render that trace instead of summarizing it into tasteful haze.

dialogue_rules.default_contraction_use: High. Contractions are the spoken norm for most characters; fuller forms are reserved for Snape, ritual language, or deliberate emphasis.

prose_style_profile.chapter_texture_variance: Alternate scene density, dialogue load, and movement mode aggressively: confrontation against quiet meals, subterranean revelation against corridor farce, ritual compression against spring drift, so no consecutive chapters feel built from the same emotional or structural template.
prose_style_profile.diction: British boarding-school realism under wartime pressure, with speculative vocabulary introduced only when Owen's attention earns it.
prose_style_profile.narrative_distance: Close third limited through Owen, with only brief sensory widenings that he could plausibly notice in the moment.
prose_style_profile.rhythm_target: Alternate analytic accumulation with blunt corporeal sentences. Quiet chapters should breathe; punishment and ritual chapters should tighten without clipping grammar.
